projects.title: Midtown Asphalt Driveway Resurfacing – 2-Car Home
projects.summary: Resurfaced a worn 2-car asphalt driveway with fresh overlay and clean edges.
projects.description: This 2-car driveway had extensive surface cracking and faded sealant. We milled high spots, repaired potholes, and applied a new 1.5" asphalt overlay with clean transitions to the sidewalk and garage slab.

projects.title: Buckhead Hillside Asphalt Driveway Replacement
projects.summary: Full-depth replacement of a sloped asphalt driveway with improved drainage.
projects.description: Removed the failing asphalt down to the base, regraded for better water runoff, compacted new aggregate, and installed a 3" asphalt driveway with crisp edging and a standard finish.

projects.title: Decatur Family Home Asphalt Driveway Upgrade
projects.summary: New asphalt surface with widened parking pad for a growing family.
projects.description: The original narrow driveway was replaced and widened to allow two vehicles side by side. Included base repairs, new asphalt installation, and standard finish suitable for everyday residential use.

projects.title: East Atlanta Bungalow Asphalt Patch & Seal
projects.summary: Smaller asphalt driveway with patch repairs and fresh sealcoat.
projects.description: Performed localized patching of potholes and low spots, crack filling, and a two-coat seal over the existing asphalt surface to extend its life.

projects.title: Sandy Springs Estate Asphalt Circle Drive
projects.summary: Large circular asphalt driveway with guest parking area.
projects.description: Installed a new full-depth asphalt circle drive with integrated guest parking. Included under-drain installation and decorative border cuts.

projects.title: Suburban Brushed Concrete Driveway – 600 sq ft
projects.summary: Standard brushed concrete driveway with control joints and 4" slab.
projects.description: Removed old cracked concrete and installed a new 4" reinforced slab with broom finish, control joints, and a 3-year workmanship warranty.

projects.title: Inman Park Narrow Concrete Driveway
projects.summary: Compact concrete driveway suited for a tight intown lot.
projects.description: Installed a reinforced concrete driveway with a slightly exposed aggregate border to match the historic character of the home.

projects.title: Vinings Oversized Concrete Driveway Replacement
projects.summary: Oversized driveway replacement with integrated walkway.
projects.description: Complete tear-out and replacement of a large, cracked concrete driveway. Added a broom-finished walkway and improved apron at the street.

projects.title: Brookhaven Paver Driveway with Border Accent
projects.summary: Concrete paver driveway with contrasting soldier-course border.
projects.description: Excavated existing gravel, installed compacted base and bedding sand, and laid concrete pavers in a herringbone pattern with a darker border course.

projects.title: Virginia-Highland Decorative Paver Drive
projects.summary: Decorative paver driveway blending with historic brick home.
projects.description: Installed tumbled concrete pavers in a running bond pattern with permeable joints to help reduce runoff on a gently sloped lot.

projects.title: Lakehouse Crushed Stone Driveway Refresh
projects.summary: Regraded and refreshed crushed stone driveway for seasonal home.
projects.description: Regraded the existing gravel driveway, installed new crusher run and topping stone, and compacted for a smoother drive surface.

projects.title: Rural Farm Access Lane Stabilization
projects.summary: Stabilized farm access lane with recycled asphalt millings.
projects.description: Applied recycled asphalt millings over a compacted base for a cost-effective, semi-paved farm access lane.

projects.title: Avondale Estates Asphalt Overlay – 500 sq ft
projects.summary: Standard asphalt overlay on an aging residential driveway.
projects.description: Crack-sealed and levelled low spots before installing a uniform asphalt overlay with a standard finish, improving curb appeal.

projects.title: Cottage-Style Concrete Strip Driveway
projects.summary: Narrow strip-style concrete drive leading to backyard parking.
projects.description: Installed two parallel concrete strips with grass in the middle to preserve the cottage aesthetic while providing stable parking.

projects.title: Druid Hills Long Asphalt Driveway Resurfacing
projects.summary: Resurfaced long asphalt driveway serving rear-entry garage.
projects.description: Performed extensive crack filling, base patching, and a new asphalt overlay with careful tie-ins to the existing rear alley.

projects.title: Subdivision Entry Paver Driveway
projects.summary: Compact paver driveway for a townhome entry.
projects.description: Replaced a plain concrete pad with interlocking pavers to match the community’s updated design standards.

projects.title: Grant Park Compact Asphalt Driveway
projects.summary: Compact asphalt driveway behind a historic home.
projects.description: Installed a new asphalt driveway accessed via alley, with gentle transitions and minimal disturbance to surrounding landscaping.

projects.title: Rural Estate Gravel Turnaround Drive
projects.summary: Extended gravel driveway with large vehicle turnaround.
projects.description: Extended existing gravel lane and created a compacted turnaround area sized for delivery trucks and trailers.

services.name: Asphalt Resurfacing
services.description: Overlay and resurfacing of existing asphalt driveways, including minor base repairs and crack filling.

services.name: Asphalt Driveway Replacement
services.description: Full-depth removal and replacement of failing asphalt driveways with new base and surface courses.

services.name: Concrete Driveways
services.description: New concrete driveway installation and replacement, including standard brushed and decorative finishes.

services.name: Driveway Sealing & Crack Filling
services.description: Protective sealcoating for asphalt driveways, including crack filling and minor surface patching.

services.name: Seasonal Driveway Snow Removal
services.description: Seasonal and per-visit snow plowing and shoveling services for residential driveways.

services.name: General Driveway Paving
services.description: Flexible paving options for new or existing driveways, including asphalt and paver surfaces for mid-size projects.

service_areas.description: Service area for Midtown high-rises, historic homes, and Old Fourth Ward neighborhoods.

service_areas.name: Decatur & Eastside
service_areas.description: Eastside service area including Decatur, Avondale Estates, and surrounding intown neighborhoods.

service_areas.name: South Atlanta & Airport Area
service_areas.description: Service area for South Atlanta neighborhoods, including areas near the airport corridor.

service_packages.name: Standard Asphalt Resurfacing (Up to 600 sq ft)
service_packages.description: Standard 1.5" asphalt overlay including basic crack filling and edge cleanup. Ideal for 1–2 car residential driveways.

service_packages.name: Premium Asphalt Resurfacing with Edge Rebuild
service_packages.description: Premium overlay with added base repairs along edges, upgraded mix, and extended warranty.

service_packages.name: Standard Asphalt Driveway Replacement (2-Car)
service_packages.description: Full-depth tear-out and replacement for typical 2-car driveways, including new compacted base and asphalt surface.

service_packages.name: Long-Drive Asphalt Replacement
service_packages.description: Designed for long residential drives leading to rear garages or outbuildings.

service_packages.name: Standard Brushed Concrete Driveway (Approx. 600 sq ft)
service_packages.description: 4" reinforced concrete slab with broom finish and standard control joints. Suited for most 2-car driveways.

service_packages.name: Premium Concrete Driveway with Decorative Border
service_packages.description: Upgraded mix, decorative border, and thicker slab section at garage entry, plus extended warranty.

service_packages.name: Basic Driveway Sealcoat (Single Car)
service_packages.description: Single-coat asphalt sealer application for smaller single-car driveways. Crack filling not included.

service_packages.name: Plus Sealing Plan with Crack Filling (2-Car)
service_packages.description: Two-coat seal application including hot rubberized crack filling for most cracks up to 1/2" wide. Ideal for standard 2-car driveways.

service_packages.name: Premium Sealing & Crack Repair Plan
service_packages.description: Upgraded sealer, extensive crack filling, and minor patching with a 3-year limited warranty.

service_packages.name: Standard Seasonal Snow Plan (15 Visits, 50 ft)
service_packages.description: Seasonal snow removal for driveways up to 50 ft long, with up to 15 plow or shovel visits.

service_packages.name: Extended Seasonal Snow Plan (20 Visits, 50 ft)
service_packages.description: Seasonal coverage with up to 20 visits for a residential driveway up to 50 ft long.

service_packages.name: Long Drive Seasonal Snow Plan (20 Visits, 80 ft)
service_packages.description: For longer residential driveways up to 80 ft, includes up to 20 service visits per season.

service_packages.name: Asphalt Paving Package (500–800 sq ft)
service_packages.description: Flexible asphalt paving package for mid-size residential driveways, including base prep and standard finish.

service_packages.name: Paver Driveway Package (500–700 sq ft)
service_packages.description: Interlocking concrete paver installation for decorative residential driveways.

crew_reviews.comment: Flawless asphalt driveway replacement. Crew was on time, and the new surface drains perfectly.
They tore out and replaced our cracked driveway in two days. Very professional and tidy.
Great communication and workmanship on our 2-car asphalt replacement.
Driveway looks fantastic after the full replacement. Minor delay due to weather but well worth it.
Asphalt replacement crew was courteous, and they explained every step. Highly recommend.
They resurfaced and widened our asphalt driveway. Smooth finish and clean edges.
Crew handled a full asphalt replacement on a steep driveway with no issues.
Quality work on our resurfacing project and fair price.
New concrete driveway looks great. A bit of noise early in the morning but otherwise smooth project.
Excellent broom finish and clean control joints on our 600 sq ft concrete driveway.
Happy with the concrete install overall, though cleanup could have been more thorough.
They filled all visible cracks and sealed the driveway in under half a day.
Good sealing job and crack filling, driveway looks almost new.
Arrived a bit later than scheduled but finished the sealing before rain moved in.
Snow removal plan worked great all winter. They cleared the driveway before my morning commute.
Very reliable snow crew, even during the biggest storm of the season.
Beautiful paver driveway installation with a nice border detail.
Great craftsmanship on the pavers, though the project took one extra day.

crews.name: Asphalt Elite Replacement Crew
crews.bio: Specialized asphalt team focusing on full-depth driveway replacements and resurfacing overlays. Known as our highest-rated asphalt replacement crew with over 50 verified homeowner reviews and consistent 4.80.0 star satisfaction on medium to large residential projects.

crews.name: Concrete Masters Install Team
crews.bio: Dedicated concrete driveway installation crew experienced with standard brushed slabs and decorative borders. Ideal for 2-car driveways and full replacements with clean control joints and proper drainage.

crews.name: SealGuard Driveway Maintenance Crew
crews.bio: Sealcoating and maintenance specialists handling crack filling, sealcoat application, and small asphalt touch-ups. Optimized for fast single-day sealing on 11 car and 2-car driveways.

crews.name: Metro Snow Response Team
crews.bio: Seasonal snow removal crew focused on reliable plowing and hand shoveling for driveways under seasonal plans. Monitors winter storms and proactively schedules visits for covered customers.

crews.name: Paver Crafters Hardscape Crew
crews.bio: Hardscape specialists installing paver driveways, aprons, and decorative borders. Skilled at tying new paver surfaces into existing concrete and asphalt for a cohesive look.

crews.name: Value Asphalt Driveway Crew
crews.bio: Budget-conscious asphalt crew offering straightforward replacements and overlays on small to mid-size residential driveways, with a focus on clear pricing and quick turnaround.

crews.name: Budget Concrete Driveway Team
crews.bio: Concrete driveway installers focused on standard brushed finishes and cost-effective replacements for single and 2-car homes.

crews.name: Eastside Driveway Maintenance Crew
crews.bio: Maintenance-focused team handling sealing, crack filling, and small patch repairs for aging asphalt driveways, especially in tight intown neighborhoods.

crews.name: Southside Snow & Ice Crew
crews.bio: Snow and ice response crew serving the southern metro and airport corridor with seasonal plans and on-demand clearing for longer driveways.

crews.name: Metro Mixed-Surface Driveway Crew
crews.bio: Versatile crew experienced with asphalt replacements, concrete installations, and paver drive sections, ideal for complex projects that combine multiple surfaces or require phased work.
